mainEntity.name: Does comp cover home modifications after leg amputation in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: Does comp cover home modifications after leg amputation in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, prosthetics and reasonable home mods (ramps) under medical benefits if doctor-approved[1].

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay severe injuries qualify for adaptive equipment/home changes. Insurers cap "reasonable"—appeal denials with OT eval. Permanent awards separate[1][3].

name: Home Mods After Amputation Holladay
description: Yes, prosthetics and reasonable home mods (ramps) under medical benefits if doctor-approved[1].
